steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Distribute on both sides:
$$12(x-3)=-3(x+12)$$
$$12x-36=-3x-36$$
Add $3x$ and $36$ to both sides: $$15x=0$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: Because the coefficient of $x$ is nonzero, the equation has exactly one solution: $x=0$. In Desmos, graph each side or solve the simplified equation; the two lines meet once. That matches choice A, so A is correct.
